evals.name: technical-concept-article
evals.prompt: Use $explain-article to explain Transformer in Chinese.
evals.expected_output: A Chinese Markdown explanatory article with audience assumptions, core claim, at least two default Mermaid diagrams, mechanism explanation, concrete example, misconception or boundary section, understanding questions, and sources.

evals.name: nontechnical-abstract-concept
evals.prompt: Use $explain-article to write an article explaining inflation to a curious high-school student.
evals.expected_output: An explanatory article that defines reader assumptions, builds from concrete examples to causal model, uses visuals for flow or contrast, avoids unsupported policy claims, and includes checks.

evals.name: misconception-repair
evals.prompt: Use $explain-article to explain why correlation is not causation.
evals.expected_output: An article that states the tempting wrong model, shows why it fails, introduces a better causal model, uses contrasting cases, and tests transfer.
